title: Air Wick |Smooth Satin & Moon Lily |Automatic Air Freshener | Freshmatic Auto Spray Refill | 250ml| Pack of 4
features: Experience the enticing, floral notes of moon Lily, and slip away to a luxurious world of satin sheets and delicate perfume
Automatically releases fragrance into your home
Refill for Air Wick freshmatic max kit
Bursts of fragrance to constantly freshen your home and neutralise odours
Up to 70 days of continuous fragrance per refill
description: One spritz of Air Wick Freshmatic Max Air Freshener is enough to fill a room. Choose the setting from subtle fragrance for smaller rooms to a vibrant blast for larger ones for continual release. This delicately scented air freshener refill is designed for use with the Air Wick Freshmatic Max Automatic Spray. Enhance your home& story with Air Wick Freshmatic Automatic Sprays. Experience the enticing, floral notes of Moon Lily and slip away to a world of satin sheets and delicate perfume. Air Wick Freshmatic Automatic Sprays release bursts of continuous fresh fragrance so your home always smells welcoming. Just set the air freshener to your preferred fragrance intensity setting and enjoy while the smooth satin and moon lily refill neutralises odours. Fragrances your home for up to 60 days when on low setting. Note: Date mentioned on the item is manufactured date and not the expiry date.
